response.text:
Added a frequency measurement on CH1.

What I did:
- Sent `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY`
- Set its source with `MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1`

I first tried querying `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS?`, but this scope rejects that query form with “Query not allowed,” so I switched to just issuing the add command directly, which worked.

If you want, I can also verify it on-screen with a screenshot.
